hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次；【FINANCE】美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响；【FINANCE】通胀报告发布后，美联储下一次降息的预期被推迟。

items.title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
items.summary: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
items.summary_zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

items.title: Fed votes to hold rates steady, notes 'uncertain' impacts from Iran war
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its decision in interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: Expectations for the next Fed rate cut get pushed back after hot inflation report
items.summary: Futures markets took any realistic chance of a cut off the table until at least December.
items.title_zh: 通胀报告发布后，美联储下一次降息的预期被推迟
items.summary_zh: 至少在 12 月之前，期货市场都会抓住任何切实际的机会。

items.title: Bitcoin's latest fear unlocked as rate hike bets rise and bond markets crumble
items.summary: For now, surging oil prices and persistent geopolitical tensions are driving inflation fears and weakening traditional safe-haven assets.
items.title_zh: 随着加息押注增加和债券市场崩溃，比特币的最新担忧被释放
items.summary_zh: 目前，飙升的油价和持续的地缘政治紧张局势正在加剧通胀担忧并削弱传统避险资产。

items.title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
items.summary: Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments require a more conservative approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息
items.summary_zh: 沃勒在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，最近的事态发展需要采取更加保守的做法。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Uninterested in Cease-Fire Because U.S. Is ‘Obliterating the Other Side’
items.summary: The price of oil remains high. At least 37 energy oil refineries, natural gas fields and other energy sites in nine countries have been damaged since the United States and Israel began bombarding Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普对停火不感兴趣，因为美国正在“消灭对方”
items.summary_zh: 石油价格仍然很高。自美国和以色列开始轰炸伊朗以来，9个国家至少37座能源炼油厂、天然气田和其他能源场所遭到破坏。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
items.summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.
items.title_zh: 铜与黄金一起遭遇大宗商品抛售。背后有一个令人担忧的原因
items.summary_zh: 在大幅上涨之后，由于油价上涨加剧了通胀和增长担忧，金属周四面临压力。

items.title: Here are the five key takeaways from this week's Fed meeting
items.summary: While no one expected the Fed to cut — much less hike — at this meeting, the market always looks for clues about what's next.
items.title_zh: 以下是本周美联储会议的五个关键要点
items.summary_zh: 尽管没有人预计美联储会在这次会议上降息——更不用说加息了，但市场总是在寻找有关下一步走势的线索。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in January.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储一月份上次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase taps A'ja Wilson, Tom Brady for new athlete wealth management push
items.summary: JPMorgan's move reflects growing competition among banks and wealth managers to serve athletes, who are increasingly becoming entrepreneurs and investors.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通聘请阿贾·威尔逊和汤姆·布雷迪推动新运动员财富管理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的此举反映了银行和财富管理机构之间为服务运动员而日益激烈的竞争，而运动员正日益成为企业家和投资者。

items.title: BTS return from military service - but does their album live up to the hype?
items.summary: The band's 10th album sees them return to the rebellious, rap-heavy sound of their early days.
items.title_zh: BTS 服完兵役归来，但他们的专辑是否达到了宣传的效果呢？
items.summary_zh: 在乐队的第十张专辑中，他们回归了早期叛逆、说唱的风格。

items.title: Mexican teen dies while being held in US immigration custody
items.summary: Royer Perez-Jimenez died amid a surge of migrant deaths under Donald Trump's immigration crackdown.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥青少年在美国移民拘留期间死亡
items.summary_zh: 罗耶·佩雷斯·希门尼斯因唐纳德·特朗普的移民镇压导致移民死亡激增而去世。

items.title: Australia PM heckled at Sydney mosque Ramadan event
items.summary: The government's response to the Israel-Gaza war and rising Islamophobia has angered many Muslim Australians.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚总理在悉尼清真寺斋月活动中受到质问
items.summary_zh: 政府对以色列-加沙战争和日益高涨的伊斯兰恐惧症的反应激怒了许多澳大利亚穆斯林。

items.title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor remark in meeting with Japan's PM
items.summary: President Trump compared US strikes on Iran to the deadly 1941 Japanese attack and declaration of war as part of World War Two.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在会见日本首相时发表珍珠港言论
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统将美国对伊朗的打击与 1941 年日本发动致命袭击并作为第二次世界大战的一部分宣战进行了比较。

items.title: A Diary of War From an Unlikely Author: the Son of Iran’s President
items.summary: In an online journal, Yousef Pezeshkian offers readers a mix of personal anecdotes and glimpses behind the scenes as Iranian leaders are picked off one after another.
items.title_zh: 出自不太可能的作者之手的战争日记：伊朗总统的儿子
items.summary_zh: 在一本在线期刊中，优素福·佩泽什基安 (Yousef Pezeshkian) 为读者提供了一系列个人轶事和伊朗领导人相继被抓的幕后花絮。

items.title: U.S. Asked to Keep Military Planes in Sri Lanka Before Iran Airstrikes
items.summary: Sri Lanka did not agree to the request, officials said, and has tried to remain neutral in the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran.
items.title_zh: 美国要求在伊朗空袭之前将军机留在斯里兰卡
items.summary_zh: 官员称，斯里兰卡没有同意这一要求，并试图在美以伊朗战争中保持中立。

items.title: Iran War Fallout: Southeast Asia Hard Hit by Skyrocketing Fuel Prices
items.summary: Across Southeast Asia, a region heavily dependent on energy exports brought via the Strait of Hormuz, lives are being upended by higher oil and gas prices.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争余波：东南亚因燃油价格飙升而遭受重创
items.summary_zh: 在整个东南亚，这个严重依赖霍尔木兹海峡能源出口的地区，石油和天然气价格上涨正在改变人们的生活。

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's past political cash gives AI PAC fuel for bashing NY candidate Bores
items.summary: A mailer from Think Big PAC told voters that the Democratic U.S. House candidate once got $100,000 in support from the former head of failed global exchange FTX.
items.title_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德过去的政治资金为 AI PAC 抨击纽约候选人博雷斯提供了动力
items.summary_zh: Think Big PAC 的一名邮件告诉选民，这位民主党美国众议院候选人曾获得失败的全球交易所 FTX 前负责人的 10 万美元支持。

items.title: Senators say they've reached compromise on yield to advance crypto market bill
items.summary: One of the major sticking points on the crypto market structure bill may be resolved, at least enough to move toward a Senate hearing to advance the bill.
items.title_zh: 参议员表示，他们已就收益率达成妥协，以推进加密货币市场法案
items.summary_zh: 加密市场结构法案的主要症结之一可能会得到解决，至少足以推动参议院举行听证会以推进该法案。

items.title: Kalshi gets temporary Nevada ban in dispute over sports betting
items.summary: A Nevada court issued a 14-day ban on a wide range of contracts from prediction market firm Kalshi as the firm continues battling with state regulators.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希因体育博彩争议而获得内华达州临时禁令
items.summary_zh: 内华达州一家法院对预测市场公司 Kalshi 的一系列合同发布了为期 14 天的禁令，该公司继续与州监管机构进行斗争。

items.title: Nasdaq winning SEC approval to move stocks onchain shows how Wall Street is taking charge of crypto tech
items.summary: Nasdaq's structure the SEC approved opens door to bring blockchain benefits to equities, while preserving the same-old intermediaries and market structure, industry insiders say.
items.title_zh: 纳斯达克获得美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 批准将股票转移到链上，这表明华尔街如何掌控加密技术
items.summary_zh: 业内人士表示，美国证券交易委员会批准的纳斯达克结构为将区块链优势引入股票打开了大门，同时保留了原有的中介机构和市场结构。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 6.3% as index rises
items.summary: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 2.5% from Thursday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：随着指数上涨，Aptos (APT) 上涨 6.3%
items.summary_zh: 比特币现金 (BCH) 较周四上涨 2.5%，与 Aptos (APT) 一起成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: Coinbase introduces stock perpetual futures contracts for non-U.S. customers
items.summary: The contracts trade 24/7, are cash-settled in USDC and allow for up to 10-times leverage on single-stock contracts and 20-times on ETF products.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 为非美国客户推出股票永续期货合约
items.summary_zh: 这些合约 24/7 进行交易，以 USDC 现金结算，单一股票合约的杠杆高达 10 倍，ETF 产品的杠杆高达 20 倍。

items.title: Grayscale files for HYPE ETF tracking largest onchain perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary: According to the filing on Friday, the Grayscale HYPE ETF would trade on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GHYP if approved.
items.title_zh: HYPE ETF 的灰度文件跟踪最大的链上 Perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary_zh: 根据周五提交的文件，如果获得批准，Grayscale HYPE ETF 将在纳斯达克交易，股票代码为 GHYP。

items.title: Lawmakers reach breakthrough with ‘agreement in principle’ over stablecoin yield in sweeping crypto bill
items.summary: Key negotiators in advancing sweeping crypto legislation have reached an "agreement in principle" around the treatment of stablecoin yield.
items.title_zh: 立法者在全面的加密货币法案中就稳定币收益率达成“原则协议”取得突破
items.summary_zh: 推进全面加密货币立法的主要谈判者已就稳定币收益率的处理达成了“原则协议”。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Seeking to Rely Less on China, U.S. Pushes a Rare Earths Partnership on a Reluctant Brazil
items.summary: Seeking to reduce its reliance on China, the United States is pushing for a critical minerals deal with Brazil. The South American country is less eager.
items.title_zh: 为了减少对中国的依赖，美国推动与不情愿的巴西建立稀土合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: 为了减少对中国的依赖，美国正在推动与巴西达成一项重要的矿产协议。南美国家则不那么热心。

items.title: BitFuFu leans further into cloud mining as revenue mix shifts, profitability swings to loss
items.summary: The cost of mining bitcoin has climbed substantially over the past year, and miners are looking for steadier revenue streams.
items.title_zh: 随着收入结构的转变，盈利能力转向亏损，BitFuFu 进一步倾向于云挖矿
items.summary_zh: 过去一年，比特币开采成本大幅攀升，矿工们正在寻求更稳定的收入来源。

items.title: Tom Lee-linked Eightco ups equity stake in OpenAI to $40 million
items.summary: Ethereum treasury, Bitmine Immersion Technologies' Chairman Tom Lee recently joined Eightco's board of directors.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 关联的 Evenco 将 OpenAI 的股权增至 4000 万美元
items.summary_zh: 以太坊金库、Bitmine Immersion Technologies 董事长 Tom Lee 最近加入了 Evenco 董事会。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.

items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.

items.title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
items.summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
items.title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
items.summary_zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

items.title: OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks
items.summary: People in China are rushing to buy preowned computers to try OpenClaw with demand for MacBooks particularly high, according to one reseller.
items.title_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 需求正在推高二手 MacBook 的价格
items.summary_zh: 据一位经销商称，中国人正争相购买二手电脑来尝试 OpenClaw，其中对 MacBook 的需求特别高。

items.title: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
items.summary: Crown Princess Mette Marit tells Norwegian TV she wishes she had never met the late sex offender.
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃打破沉默，声称自己被爱泼斯坦“操纵和欺骗”
items.summary_zh: 王储妃梅特·马里特告诉挪威电视台，她希望自己从未见过这位已故的性犯罪者。

items.title: Ukraine-Hungary oil pipeline row threatens EU loan
items.summary: Kyiv and Budapest disagree on how badly damaged a hub in western Ukraine bombed by Russia really is, as its oil flow remains suspended.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰-匈牙利石油管道争端威胁欧盟贷款
items.summary_zh: 基辅和布达佩斯对于俄罗斯轰炸的乌克兰西部一个枢纽的严重程度存在分歧，因为该枢纽的石油供应仍然暂停。

items.title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
items.summary: Syria condemned the strikes on weapons sites and government infrastructure as an "outrageous" assault on Syria's sovereignty.
items.title_zh: 德鲁兹冲突后以色列袭击叙利亚
items.summary_zh: 叙利亚谴责对武器基地和政府基础设施的袭击是对叙利亚主权的“无耻”攻击。

items.title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
items.summary: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.
items.title_zh: 突尼斯反种族主义领袖被判入狱八年
items.summary_zh: 萨迪亚·莫斯巴为移民开展竞选活动，特别是在总统凯斯·赛义德表示移民对国家构成人口威胁之后。

items.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
items.summary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.
items.title_zh: 出版商因人工智能索赔而取消恐怖小说的发行
items.summary_zh: 作者米娅·巴拉德否认自己在撰写恐怖故事《害羞女孩》时使用了人工智能。

items.title: Several injured as turbulence hits Delta flight into Sydney
items.summary: Three flight attendants were taken to hospital after the Airbus A350 experienced turbulence during its descent into Sydney Airport.
items.title_zh: 达美航空飞往悉尼的航班遭遇湍流 多人受伤
items.summary_zh: 空客 A350 在降落悉尼机场时遭遇颠簸，三名空乘人员被送往医院。

items.title: On a Holiday of Renewal, Iranians Are Mourning and Fearful
items.summary: As they start a new year, Iranians are reckoning with bombardment, repression and economic misery. Still, many are holding fast to ancient traditions.
items.title_zh: 在重生的节日里，伊朗人哀悼和恐惧
items.summary_zh: 新的一年开始之际，伊朗人面临着轰炸、镇压和经济苦难。尽管如此，许多人仍然坚守古老的传统。

items.title: Trump Organization Eyes Transylvania Golf Course Deal
items.summary: The president’s company is eyeing a site for a golf course and luxury apartments. Will a huge landfill and a troubled project history stand in the way?
items.title_zh: 特朗普集团关注特兰西瓦尼亚高尔夫球场交易
items.summary_zh: 总统的公司正在考虑选址建造高尔夫球场和豪华公寓。巨大的垃圾填埋场和陷入困境的项目历史会成为阻碍吗？

items.title: Hamas Considering Disarmament Plan From Trump’s Board of Peace, Officials Say
items.summary: The proposal envisions a phased process, in which the militant group would hand over its weapons and Israeli troops would withdraw. Hamas is expected to respond in the coming days.
items.title_zh: 官员称，哈马斯正在考虑特朗普和平委员会的裁军计划
items.summary_zh: 该提案设想了一个分阶段的过程，武装组织将交出武器，以色列军队将撤离。预计哈马斯将在未来几天做出回应。

items.title: Denmark Was Ready to Blow Up Airfields to Stop a U.S. Invasion of Greenland
items.summary: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.
items.title_zh: 丹麦准备炸毁机场以阻止美国入侵格陵兰岛
items.summary_zh: 丹麦人向格陵兰岛运送了血液供应、炸药和实弹，作为应急计划的一部分，以防特朗普总统兑现其夺取该岛的威胁。

items.title: BTS Leans Into Korean History With ‘Arirang.’ Here Are the Major References.
items.summary: The group’s new album “Arirang” includes a nod to a beloved Korean folk song and other important historical references.

items.title: Why CoinDesk PitchFest matters heading into Miami
items.summary: Lin examines the role of the Consensus event in providing founders with structured access to the sector’s most influential decision-makers.
items.title_zh: 为什么 CoinDesk PitchFest 进驻迈阿密很重要
items.summary_zh: 林探讨了共识活动在为创始人提供接触该行业最有影响力的决策者的结构化渠道方面的作用。

items.title: Crypto wallet maker Ledger taps former Circle exec as CFO to help lead IPO push
items.summary: The crypto security firm is expanding its U.S. footprint and strengthening its leadership team as it prepares for a potential public listing.
items.title_zh: 加密钱包制造商 Ledger 任命前 Circle 高管为首席财务官，帮助领导 IPO 推动
items.summary_zh: 这家加密安全公司正在扩大其在美国的业务，并加强其领导团队，为潜在的公开上市做准备。

items.title: Kalshi valuation doubles to $22 billion in latest funding round: Bloomberg
items.summary: The new $1 billion investment round indicates that interest in the embattled prediction market remains.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 在最新一轮融资中估值翻倍至 220 亿美元：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 新一轮 10 亿美元的投资表明，人们对陷入困境的预测市场的兴趣依然存在。

items.title: ‘Replacing humans is not close’: BlockSec challenges EVMBench on AI auditing
items.summary: “The real question is not ‘Can AI replace humans?’ but ‘How should humans and AI work together?’” BlockSec co-founder Yajin Zhou said.
items.title_zh: “取代人类还很遥远”：BlockSec 在人工智能审计方面向 EVMBench 发起挑战
items.summary_zh: “真正的问题不是‘人工智能可以取代人类吗？’而是‘人类和人工智能应该如何合作？’”BlockSec 联合创始人周亚金说。

items.title: Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
items.summary: While blockchain gaming has yet to live up to its promise, some companies, and top brands, have not given up.

items.summary_zh: 尽管区块链游戏尚未兑现其承诺，但一些公司和顶级品牌并未放弃。

items.title: Kalshi faces temporary halt in Nevada as court grants restraining order: reports
items.summary: Nevada is reportedly halting the operations of prediction market Kalshi within the state — at least for now.

items.summary_zh: 据报道，内华达州正在停止该州预测市场 Kalshi 的运营——至少目前是这样。

items.title: Ledger appoints former Circle exec as CFO, opens New York office as firm explores potential US IPO
items.summary: The move builds on earlier reports that Ledger is exploring a New York IPO that could value it at more than $4 billion.
items.title_zh: Ledger 任命前 Circle 高管为首席财务官，并开设纽约办事处，同时公司正在探索美国 IPO 的可能性
items.summary_zh: 此前有报道称，Ledger 正在探索纽约 IPO，估值可能超过 40 亿美元。

items.title: Kalshi raises over $1 billion at $22 billion valuation in ongoing Coatue-led round: reports
items.summary: The funding highlights continued investor demand for prediction markets despite rising legal challenges and regulatory scrutiny.
items.title_zh: 据报道，Kalshi 在 Coatue 主导的一轮融资中筹集了超过 10 亿美元，估值为 220 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管法律挑战和监管审查不断增加，但此次融资凸显了投资者对预测市场的持续需求。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入

items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.

items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meets people’s needs.

items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
